## Summary

- Describe the user-facing or developer-facing change.

## Rationale

- Explain why this change is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] Relevant manual checks, if any, are described above

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation is updated or not needed
- [ ] Tests are added or updated where behavior changed
- [ ] Security or privacy implications are considered
